nasb.text: Therefore I want the men in every place to pray, lifting up holy hands, without wrath and dissension.

esv.text: I desire then that in every place the men should pray, lifting holy hands without anger or quarreling;

cnv.text: 因此，我願意男人沒有忿怒，沒有爭論，舉起聖潔的手隨處禱告。

ccb.text: 我愿男人举起圣洁的手随处祷告，不发怒，不争辩。

csbs.text: 所以，我希望在各个地方的男人都举起圣洁的手祷告，不动怒、不争论；
